opportunities.rationale: Highest-conviction pair in the current regime. LLY continues to execute in obesity drugs while NVO has repriced lower on weaker 2026 guidance and trial disappointment. Quality-vs-reset dynamic is intact; high-vol environment makes the pair relatively immune to index direction. Tightened risk_percent from 3 to 2 given elevated VIX.

Costco's membership model and recent beat potential should allow outperformance vs Walmart in a defensive consumer environment. Note: Dick's Sporting Goods earnings on 12 Mar could shift consumer-retail sentiment — size accordingly.

New pair for this window. Long Energy (beneficiary of $84 WTI and geopolitical oil premium) / Short Airlines (victim of high jet-fuel costs and slowing consumer travel). Mirrors the sector rotation dynamic cleanly. Exit on confirmed Strait of Hormuz ceasefire.
In risk-off high-vol regimes BTC tends to outperform high-beta L1s like SOL. Updated BTC entry to current ~69,883 level. Conviction kept low; position size 2%.
